name: John Doe
bio: John Doe is a professional web development mentor who teaches HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, backend APIs, and modern full-stack project building.

name: Sarah Smith
bio: Sarah Smith helps learners understand clean interface design, user experience, wireframing, prototyping, color theory, typography, and product design thinking.

name: Mike Johnson
bio: Mike Johnson teaches digital marketing, SEO, social media strategy, campaign planning, paid advertising, analytics, and online lead generation.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Emma Wilson teaches practical AI tools, automation workflows, productivity systems, content automation, and business process optimization.
